title: Pricing
description: MedLens+ is free during the public beta. Join the waitlist — no credit card, no surprise charges.

seo.title: MedLens+ Pricing — Free Public Beta
seo.description: Early access to MedLens+ is free while we're in public beta. Join the waitlist to organize lab reports into timelines — no payment info needed.

tiers.name: Public beta
tiers.description: Full access while we refine the platform with early members. No credit card required.
features: CBC, lipid, HbA1c, thyroid, and more

sections.heading: Free while we're in beta
paragraphs: We're opening MedLens+ in batches to waitlist members. Early access is completely free — we won't ask for payment details when you sign up.
You'll get an email when your spot opens. No charges, no auto-enrollment into a paid plan.

sections.heading: What's included
paragraphs: Beta members get the core workflow: upload reports, review extracted values, explore your timeline, and export a visit brief before appointments.
Supported panels include CBC, liver and kidney function, lipid profile, HbA1c, thyroid, and key vitamins. We're expanding coverage based on what you tell us.

sections.heading: What happens after beta
paragraphs: We haven't finalized paid plans yet. Waitlist members will hear from us first — with advance notice and preferential terms before anything changes.
Your beta feedback shapes what we build and how we price it. We'd rather get the product right than rush to a paywall.

faq.question: Is it really free right now?
faq.answer: Yes. The public beta costs nothing for waitlist members. We don't collect payment information when you join.

faq.question: Will I be charged automatically later?
faq.answer: No. We'll never charge you without clear notice and your explicit consent. Any future paid plans will be communicated well in advance.

faq.question: Do waitlist members get a permanent deal?
faq.answer: You'll get preferential terms when paid plans launch. We'll share specifics before pricing changes take effect.

faq.question: Is there a limit on uploads?
faq.answer: During beta we apply fair-use limits so everyone gets a good experience. Current limits are in your welcome email once you're in.

faq.question: Can I leave the waitlist?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Every email has an unsubscribe link. You can also reach us through the contact form on our About page.
